title: Autonomous Navigation for Unmanned Surface Vehicles
description: Develop ML-based autonomous navigation systems for unmanned surface vehicles operating in GPS-denied and contested maritime environments. Solutions must perform real-time obstacle avoidance and mission planning.

title: Edge AI for Contested Communications
description: Develop edge AI solutions for maintaining reliable communications in contested and degraded environments including frequency-hopping and adaptive waveform selection.

title: Hypersonic Vehicle Thermal Protection
description: Novel thermal protection system materials and designs for hypersonic vehicles operating at speeds exceeding Mach 5. Focus on ultra-high temperature ceramics and ablative composites.

title: AI-Enabled ISR Data Fusion
description: Develop AI/ML algorithms for real-time fusion of multi-source intelligence data including SAR
column11: and SIGINT for automated target recognition.

title: Neuromorphic Computing for Autonomous Systems
description: Develop neuromorphic computing architectures that enable autonomous systems to perform complex decision-making at the edge with dramatically reduced SWaP-C.

title: Quantum Sensing for Navigation
description: Novel quantum sensor approaches for precision navigation in GPS-denied environments using atom interferometry or quantum-enhanced inertial measurement.

title: Counter-UAS Detection and Defeat
description: Develop low-cost scalable systems for detecting classifying and defeating small unmanned aerial systems in complex electromagnetic environments.

title: Soldier-Worn Exoskeleton Power Systems
description: Advanced power and energy storage solutions for soldier-worn exoskeleton systems to extend operational duration and reduce logistics burden.

title: Directed Energy Beam Control
description: Develop advanced beam control and adaptive optics technologies to improve directed energy weapon effectiveness for missile defense applications.

title: Multi-Domain Kill Chain Acceleration
description: AI-enabled tools to accelerate kill chain timelines across multi-domain operations for ballistic and cruise missile defense scenarios.

title: AI Diagnostics for Rare Disease
description: Develop AI/ML approaches for earlier and more accurate diagnosis of rare diseases using multi-modal patient data including genomics imaging and clinical records.

title: Wearable Biosensors for Continuous Health Monitoring
description: Novel wearable biosensor platforms for continuous real-time monitoring of physiological biomarkers enabling early disease detection and personalized medicine.

title: CRISPR Therapeutics for Genetic Disorders
description: Develop next-generation CRISPR-based therapeutic approaches for single-gene disorders with improved specificity delivery efficiency and reduced off-target effects.

title: Small UAS for Special Operations
description: Low-signature multi-mission small UAS optimized for special operations environments requiring silent operation extended endurance and rapid deployment.

title: Advanced Soldier Biometrics
description: Biometric and cognitive performance monitoring systems for special operations forces to optimize training load mission readiness and recovery.

title: AI for Border Security
description: AI-enabled autonomous surveillance and detection systems for border security applications including cross-domain sensor fusion and anomaly detection.

title: Cybersecurity for Critical Infrastructure
description: Novel cybersecurity approaches for protecting operational technology and industrial control systems in critical infrastructure against nation-state threats.

title: Advanced Propulsion for Small Satellites
description: Miniaturized high-efficiency propulsion systems for small satellites and CubeSats enabling orbit raising station keeping and deorbit capabilities.

title: Underwater Autonomous Systems
description: Long-endurance autonomous underwater vehicles with advanced acoustic sensing navigation and payload capabilities for mine countermeasures and ISR missions.

title: Rapid Diagnostics for Biodefense
description: Point-of-care rapid diagnostic platforms for simultaneous detection of multiple biological threat agents in field-deployable formats for emergency response.
